content.en:
"Demons!"

The Wuji Heavenly Emperor was completely convinced.

The Taibai Sword Master couldn't comprehend the sixth sequence of the Dao rules, so he used the seventh sequence of the Dao Divine Power to induce the sixth sequence of the Dao Divine Power, so that the seventh sequence of the Dao Divine Power was already the sixth sequence of the Dao Divine Power to a certain extent.

He comprehended the rules of the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao, and also created the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Divine Power.

However, his physical strength and strength were far inferior to those of the Taibai Sword Master.

The physical fitness of the Taibai Sword Lord is comparable to that of the Nine Folds Dao Realm!

Therefore, after this sword was struck, he knew that he had no hope.

Tear and pull!

The Taibai Sword Lord broke through the Taixuan Floating Diagram, and another sword slashed out, completely hitting the Wuji Heavenly Emperor, and the sixth sequence of supreme rules made up for on his body continued to shatter.

Followed by.

The Taibai Sword Lord cast a sealing technique with his left hand, trying to seal the Wuji Heavenly Emperor.

The Wuji Heavenly Emperor was still trying to find a way to escape, but he was suppressed by the Taibai Sword Lord again and again.

In the end, the Wuji Heavenly Emperor was still sealed by the Taibai Sword Lord.

And the Taixuan Floating Diagram of the Wuji Heavenly Palace fell into the hands of the Taibai Sword Master, this Nine Pattern Supreme Dao Weapon belonged to him, he couldn't use it now, but he would definitely be able to use it in the future, and he could also sell it.

After that, he built a formation in the place where this seal was sealed.

Only an existence comparable in strength to him can break through here, and even more Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm can't completely break through here.

Of course, such a seal is not an eternal seal, and after countless long years, the Infinite Heavenly Emperor is still able to break the seal.

If at that time, Taisu Palace still had no way to deal with the Wuji Heavenly Emperor, then it had nothing to do with him.

He has already returned the favor of Tai Su.

"Taisu, I have sealed the Wuji Heavenly Emperor, and the rest of the matter has nothing to do with me!"

After the Taibai Sword Master summoned Taisu, he left directly.

......

Taisu Palace.

The Taisu Palace Lord received the summons from the Taibai Sword Lord and immediately breathed a sigh of relief.

She didn't dare to guarantee that the Taibai Sword Lord would really be able to seal the Wuji Heavenly Emperor, after all, she didn't know the true strength of the Taibai Sword Master, and the Taibai Sword Lord only promised to make a move once.

If the Wuji Heavenly Emperor ran away, the Taibai Sword Lord would not have been chasing and killing the Wuji Heavenly Emperor all the time.

In that case, Taisu Palace will be directly gone.

Now that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor has been sealed, Taisu Palace's plan is half the battle.

As for the other half, they have to rely on Taisu Palace and other forces to join forces to fight against the current Wuji Heavenly Palace, even so, they are not completely sure, and they may still be defeated by the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

"Inform the other forces of the Sevenfold Dao Realm, the Infinite Heavenly Emperor has been sealed by the Taibai Sword Lord, and it's time to counterattack!"

"Yes!"

The other sevenfold realms should be enlightened.

Immediately afterward, the news spread, and many of the Dao realms under the Taisu Palace knew about it.

For a moment, they were shocked.

The strength of the Taisu Palace is much worse than that of the Wuji Heavenly Palace, one Wuji Heavenly Palace is enough to suppress all the strength of the entire Wuji Domain, but I didn't expect the Taisu Palace to attack the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

If it weren't for the Wuji Heavenly Emperor being sealed, most of the Dao Realm of the Taisu Palace would definitely flee for their lives as soon as possible, instead of rebelling against the Wuji Heavenly Palace with the Taisu Palace.

Soon.

The Sevenfold Dao Realm of Taisu Palace, Hatredless Holy Land, Void Mist Holy Land, Linlong Holy Land and many other forces have all united, and when they learned that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor was suppressed and sealed, their courage was naturally greater.

Infinite Domain.

Many forces are rebelling against the Infinite Heavenly Palace, invading the Infinite Heavenly Palace's various stations.

Due to the untimely reaction of the Wuji Heavenly Palace, they thought that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor would be able to easily suppress the Taisu Palace, so they did not make any preparations.

Now, the Wuji Heavenly Emperor has been sealed, and they haven't had time to receive any news.

As a result, they were caught off guard, and many of them were killed.

......

Soon.

Wuji Heavenly Palace received the news that the Wuji Heavenly Emperor had been suppressed and sealed, and also came to the sealed place to confirm that the news was true.

So, they panicked.

They didn't know that the Taibai Sword Master only shot once, and they thought that the Taibai Sword Master would strike again!

At this time, Baizhan Tianzun was the first to run!

That's right, he followed the example of the last Luohe fortress and fled without a fight.

The key is that he escaped by himself, the key is to kidnap a female Heavenly Venerable of Wuji Heavenly Palace-Luoxi Tianzun, and as soon as the two Sevenfold Realm Heavenly Venerables left, the number of Heavenly Venerables of Wuji Heavenly Palace was reduced, and their strength was greatly reduced.

At this time.

The Taisu Palace Lord got the Hundred Battles Tianzun and Luoxi Tianzun and fled, and immediately laughed.

"Baizhan Tianzun is really cowardly, he escaped from Luohe Fortress before, and now he has escaped from Wuji Heavenly Palace, he also took Luoxi Tianzun with him this time, and we plan to directly increase the success rate by one percent!"

Subsequently.

The Taisu Palace Lord and the other Sevenfold Dao Realm raided a branch of the Sevenfold Dao Realm of the Wuji Heavenly Palace, and in a short period of time, they broke through the Wuji Heavenly Palace and besieged the Sevenfold Dao Realm Heavenly Venerable.

In this way, the Infinite Heavenly Palace lost another Sevenfold Dao Realm.

But soon, the high-level leaders of the Wuji Heavenly Palace returned to the headquarters of the Wuji Heavenly Palace.

Wuji Heavenly Palace was guarded by a large array, and Taisu Palace did not dare to attack Wuji Heavenly Palace for a while.

Taisu Palace and other forces have already made a plan, that is, to erode the territory of Wuji Heavenly Palace little by little, and occupy most of the territory while Wuji Heavenly Palace has not yet reacted.

After that, it's a long time to fight a protracted war.

After a period of time, Wuji Heavenly Palace found that the Taibai Sword Lord did not continue to make a move, and after a little inquiry, he guessed that the Taibai Sword Lord would not make another move, so he no longer worried about the Taibai Sword Master.

And so.

The real battle between the forces of Wuji Heavenly Palace and Taisu Palace began.

This war has affected the entire Infinite Realm, and many Supreme Dao Realms have fallen at every moment.

......

The land of eternity.

Ye Tian didn't know anything about the outside world, and he was still impacting the Triple Dao Realm.

After impacts again and again, he had some understanding of the impact of the Triple Dao Realm, and it wouldn't be long before he could really break through.

It's been another time.

this day.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's shackles were finally broken through by him, and his cultivation reached the Triple Dao Realm.

It took many more years for his Triple Supreme Dao Realm to finally stabilize.

Moreover, in these years, he has also perfected many supreme Dao supernatural powers such as the Supreme Dao Extreme Spear Technique, the Supreme Dao Flow Body Technique, and the Supreme Dao Vajra Body to the seventh sequence to the level of the Supreme Dao Divine Powers, and his strength can be said to have skyrocketed many times.

"With my current strength, I don't know if I can break through that big array!"

Ye Tian was ready to try it.

He used the Dao Flow Body Technique to exert his speed to the extreme, and then exhausted all his strength to burst out the peak attack power of the Supreme Dao Extreme Spear Technique.

Boom!

The large array trembled slightly, but it was not broken.
